items.docs: Returns the total number of gem downloads across all gems on RubyGems.org. This provides a single aggregate count of all gem installations ever recorded.

params.name: gemNameVersion
params.description: The gem name and version number joined by a hyphen (e.g., rails-7.0.0).

items.docs: Returns download count statistics for a specific gem version. The path parameter combines the gem name and version number with a hyphen separator (e.g., rails-7.0.0). Returns both the version- specific download count and the total download count across all versions of the gem.
